title: UnitedHealth Group Financial Summary From 2025 Form 10-K
text: UnitedHealth Group generated 2025 consolidated revenue of $447.567 billion. UnitedHealthcare revenue was $344.903 billion, while Optum generated $270.620 billion before eliminations, including $101.957 billion from Optum Health, $19.417 billion from Optum Insight, and $154.726 billion from Optum Rx. Earnings from operations were $19.0 billion, and cash flows from operations were $19.7 billion. The 2025 Form 10-K describes UnitedHealth Group as operating across UnitedHealthcare and Optum, with reportable segments in UnitedHealthcare, Optum Health, Optum Insight, and Optum Rx. The company also disclosed that premium revenues from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services represented 44% of total consolidated revenue in 2025, most of it from UnitedHealthcare Medicare & Retirement. Key risks include higher medical utilization, Medicare Advantage reimbursement pressure, Medicaid and government program changes, drug cost inflation, regulatory investigations, cybersecurity risk, provider cost trends, integration of acquisitions, debt and capital allocation, and public scrutiny of health insurer and pharmacy benefit manager practices.
